title: Programming Fundamentals
description: Start your coding journey. Learn variables, control flow, functions, and debugging — the building blocks of every program.

title: Data Structures — Linear Collections
description: Master arrays, linked lists, stacks, and queues. Understand Big-O notation and choose the right structure for any problem.

title: Object-Oriented Design
description: Model real-world systems with classes, inheritance, and polymorphism. Apply SOLID principles to write maintainable code.

title: Trees, Graphs & Hashing
description: Implement binary trees, BSTs, heaps, hash tables, and graphs. Learn traversals and solve connected-component problems.

title: Algorithms — Sorting & Recursion
description: Implement merge sort, quicksort, binary search, and backtracking. Analyze complexity with recurrence relations.

title: Databases & SQL
description: Design normalized schemas, write complex SQL queries, understand indexing, and compare SQL vs NoSQL approaches.

title: Full-Stack Web Development
description: Build RESTful APIs, responsive frontends, and connect everything to a database. Deploy a working web application.

title: Software Engineering Practices
description: Write effective tests, use Git workflows, set up CI/CD pipelines, and conduct code reviews like a professional.

title: Advanced Algorithms
description: Tackle dynamic programming, shortest-path algorithms, minimum spanning trees, and NP-completeness.

title: Systems Programming & Concurrency
description: Understand memory management, threads, synchronization, and async I/O. Build concurrent applications that don't deadlock.

title: System Design & Architecture
description: Design scalable distributed systems. Learn caching, load balancing, message queues, and designing for failure.

title: Capstone Project
description: Execute the full software lifecycle: requirements, design, implementation, testing, deployment, and monitoring.
